name: Sweet Dough for Pies
recipeIngredient: 8 tablespoons cold unsalted butter, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor fitted with the metal blade attachment, pulse together the flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder for 3 seconds.
2. Add the butter to the work bowl and pulse until the mixture is fine and powdery, resembling coarse ground cornmeal with no large pieces remaining.
3. Add the eggs and pulse until a dough forms a ball.
4. Scrape the dough onto a floured surface. Press and knead quickly for 3 or 4 turns until smooth and uniform.
5. Divide the dough into 2 equal disks, wrap each in plastic wrap, and press into a 6-inch circle.
6. Refrigerate the dough until firm and ready to use, at least 1 hour.
Yield: 1 (2 crust) pie dough
